caribbean.headline: Caribbean Sees High Rain
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing an 84% rain probability with winds reaching 11 kt and wave heights of 4.7 ft, while nearby Martinique has a wind forecast of 12 kt. I expect these conditions to impact cruise ship operations in the Lesser Antilles, particularly at ports like St. Lucia and Martinique, with less than 10% rain probability not being a concern in this specific weather scenario, as the primary focus is on the high rain probability areas.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Weather Update
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing a 74% rain probability with winds at 10 kt and wave heights of 1.1 ft, while nearby ports are seeing similar conditions. Cadiz is expecting winds to reach 12 kt with a less than 10% rain probability, making for a relatively calm day in the Western Mediterranean.
